query: SELECT id, title, phase, due_week FROM bambina_checklist ORDER BY due_week;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RXsnsHaxFXFzWXK.root --database TGNsMbsGdWXQhRmCtYbG6q --execute SELECT id, title, phase, due_week FROM bambina_checklist ORDER BY due_week;

rows.title: Register birth at Mexico City Civil Registry
Apply for UK passport for baby
Fly home to London with baby
UK Legal Fees - instruct UK lawyer (Week 20)
Purchase expressing equipment from Amazon Mexico
Set up nursery/baby area in accommodation
Arrive in Mexico City before birth
Regular Scan + Blood Count + Coagulation (36 WOG)
Weekly scans from 37 WOG - assess need for delivery
Ensure car seat is ready for hospital discharge
